steps.title: Match the plural antecedent
steps.content: The phrase "In ______ place" refers back to "the types of pop culture references." Because that antecedent is plural, the blank needs a plural possessive pronoun.

steps.title: Reject singular and contractions
steps.content: A is a singular possessive, so it does not agree with the plural antecedent. B means "they are," not a possessive. D means "it is," not a possessive. The answer is C.
